pass_policy.behavior: Guide-reviewed clean line is reproducible and bounded consequence lines produce flow-appropriate surf, flush, pin, release, flip, swimmer, and rescue outcomes.
pass_policy.physics: C++ water window passes analytic guardrails, GeoClaw parity where applicable, stitched conservation, and raft-coupling checks.
pass_policy.platform: The same authored rapid and outcome envelope survives all target scalability profiles without changing gameplay physics.
pass_policy.visual: Water, foam, spray, wet banks, rocks, foliage, and lighting agree with rights-reviewed references at the recorded flow.

runs.line_intent: Run the sourced or guide-reviewed clean line and measure timing, angle, acceleration, crew loading, and recovery.
